tagline: Timeless Temples, Bamboo Groves & Traditional Kaiseki

days.dateLabel: Day 1 - Iconic Torii Gates & Historic Markets

activities.title: Fushimi Inari Shrine Summit Trekk
activities.description: Walk through thousands of vermilion torii gates at sunrise before the daytime crowds gather on the sacred mountain.

activities.title: Nishiki Market Gourmet Walk & Matcha Tasting
activities.description: Sample fresh soy milk donuts, octopus skewers, and ceremonial Uji matcha in Kyoto's 400-year-old kitchen.

activities.title: Kiyomizu-dera Sunset Temple & Sannenzaka Alley
activities.description: Stand on the famous wooden stage overlooking cherry/maple valleys as golden hour illuminates historic wooden streets.

days.dateLabel: Day 2 - Arashiyama Bamboo Grove & Golden Pavilion

activities.title: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove & Tenryu-ji Gardens
activities.description: Stroll through towering green bamboo stalks and explore UNESCO World Heritage Zen garden ponds.

activities.title: Kaiseki Lunch along Katsura River in Arashiyama
activities.description: Savor multi-course seasonal Kyoto cuisine featuring fresh tofu, sashimi, and bamboo shoots overlooking scenic waters.

activities.title: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion) Reflection Stroll
activities.description: Admire the top two floors covered in pure gold leaf shimmering across the tranquil Mirror Pond.

days.dateLabel: Day 3 - Gion Geisha District & Philosopher's Path

activities.title: Philosopher's Path & Ginkaku-ji (Silver Pavilion)
activities.description: Follow the stone canal path lined with cherry trees and traditional tea houses up to the exquisite Silver Pavilion.

activities.title: Handmade Soba Noodles at Honke Owariya
activities.description: Dine inside a historic wooden machiya at a noodle shop that has served monks and emperors since 1465.

activities.title: Gion Geisha District Evening Lantern Walk
activities.description: Explore the atmospheric wooden alleys of Hanamikoji-dori as traditional red lanterns glow at dusk.
